summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Slot Manager drag-to-reschedule, 1-hour time intervals, and dark mode hover fix. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Drag-and-drop uses native HTML5 API with draggable attribute and proper event handlers
Reschedule API correctly accepts time, date, and resource_id parameters
Dark mode hover highlight uses appropriate color (bg-[#5FA8D3]/10) for drag-over state
Drop indicator shows blue line with time label during drag
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slot Manager drag-to-reschedule fully functional. Booking can be dragged to new time slots and different resource columns. Changes persist after page refresh.

1_hour_time_intervals.details: Time markers show 1-hour intervals: 8:00 am, 9:00 am, 10:00 am, etc. (verified in UI)

drag_to_reschedule_same_column.details: Booking can be dragged to different time slot within same resource column

drag_to_reschedule_cross_resource.details: Booking successfully moved from Bay 2 to Bay 1 via drag-and-drop

reschedule_api_endpoint.details: PUT /api/bookings/{id}/reschedule correctly accepts time, date, and resource_id

persistence_after_refresh.details: Booking position persists after page refresh - verified booking stayed at 14:00 in Bay 1

dark_mode_hover_highlight.details: Dark mode enabled, drag-over highlight uses bg-[#5FA8D3]/10 (light blue with 10% opacity)

drop_indicator.details: Blue indicator line with time label (e.g., '14:00') shows during drag

ui_verification.drag_drop_verified: Booking moved from Bay 2 at 11:00 to Bay 1 at 14:00
ui_verification.dark_mode_verified: App in dark mode with proper contrast and hover highlights

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB database
